chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.357 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application -------------------------------- 18.03.2025 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Qazi, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh Mr. Muhammad Omar Soomro, advocate for complainant -------------------------------------- At the very outset, learned counsel for applicant does not press this bail application on merits and seeks direction to the trial Court to decide the case of the applicant preferably within a period of three months. Counsel for complainant and learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh have recorded no objection for such proposal. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed. However, learned trial Court is directed to decide the case of the applicant expeditiously, preferably within a period of three months, under intimation to this Court through learned MIT-II. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
